pricing.title: Simple Pricing for All Solar Systems

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our delivery service

items.question: How secure is the file transfer?
items.answer: All files are encrypted using military-grade AES-256 encryption during transfer and at rest. We use a zero-knowledge architecture, meaning only you can access your files. We're also compliant with GDPR, HIPAA, and SOC 2 standards.

items.question: What's the maximum file size I can transfer?
items.answer: On the Free plan, you can transfer up to 2GB per transfer. Pro users can transfer up to 100GB, and Enterprise customers have no file size limits.

items.question: How long are files stored?
items.answer: Files are stored for 7 days on the Free plan, 30 days on Pro, and custom retention periods for Enterprise. You can also set custom expiry times or delete files manually at any time.

items.question: Can I integrate this with my existing tools?
items.answer: Yes! Pro and Enterprise plans include API access. We also offer pre-built integrations with popular tools like Slack, Dropbox, Google Drive, and more.

items.question: What happens if a transfer fails?
items.answer: Our system automatically retries failed transfers. If a transfer can't be completed, you'll be notified immediately and can restart the transfer. All successfully uploaded data is preserved.

items.question: Do you offer a refund policy?
items.answer: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans. If you're not satisfied, contact our support team for a full refund.

contact.title: Send Us A Transmission
contact.subtitle: Have questions? Our delivery crew is standing by! (Well, sitting mostly)
